Sergeant — Knowledge Graph

Generated 2026-07-03 · schema v1 · do not edit by hand — regenerate via pnpm docs:gen-graph.

adr: 70 audit: 24 hard-rule: 26 initiative: 51 playbook: 61 pr: 221 skill: 23
Nodes (248 core)
Type Id Title Status Meta
adr adr:0001 ADR-0001: Monetization architecture (16 рішень перед стартом) Accepted number=1
adr adr:0002 ADR-0002: AI tool lifecycle (proposal → safety review → rollout → KPIs) accepted number=2
adr adr:0003 ADR-0003: Refund and dispute handling proposed number=3
adr adr:0004 ADR-0004: CloudSync — LWW conflict resolution superseded by [ADR-0047](./0047-cloudsync-v1-410-gone.md) (CloudSync v1 → 410 Gone, T₀ executed 2026-05-06) number=4
adr adr:0005 ADR-0005: Anthropic model selection + prompt caching accepted number=5
adr adr:0006 ADR-0006: React Query keys via centralized factory (no inline tuples) accepted number=6
adr adr:0007 ADR-0007: Tailwind colour-opacity scale + WCAG-AA `-strong` tier accepted number=7
adr adr:0008 ADR-0008: Feature flags — client-only registry over typedStore accepted number=8
adr adr:0009 ADR-0009: Hosting split — Railway (API + Postgres) + Vercel (web) accepted number=9
adr adr:0010 ADR-0010: Mobile dual-track — Capacitor shell + Expo native Superseded by ADR-0052 number=10
adr adr:0011 ADR-0011: Local-first storage — клієнт як джерело істини, сервер як LWW-реплікатор Active number=11 · last_validated=2026-05-13
adr adr:0012 ADR-0012: RLS як authz boundary — цільова модель, наразі app-enforced proposed number=12
adr adr:0013 ADR-0013: DB migrations conventions — sequential, forward-only, two-phase DROP accepted number=13
adr adr:0014 ADR-0014: `bigint` → `number` coercion у API-серіалізаторах accepted number=14
adr adr:0015 ADR-0015: Observability stack — Pino + Prometheus + Sentry accepted number=15
adr adr:0016 ADR-0016: User deletion and PII handling proposed number=16
adr adr:0017 ADR-0017: Better Auth choice and session model accepted number=17
adr adr:0018 ADR-0018: API versioning policy (`/api/v1`) Superseded by [ADR-0053](./0053-api-versioning-policy.md) number=18
adr adr:0019 ADR-0019: Push notifications — server-driven fan-out (web + APNs + FCM) accepted number=19
adr adr:0020 ADR-0020: Testing pyramid — unit / integration / a11y / smoke-e2e accepted number=20
adr adr:0021 ADR-0021: Memory Bank — local-first AI user-fact store accepted number=21
adr adr:0022 ADR-0022: Atomic SQL daily quotas — `INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE WHERE` accepted number=22
adr adr:0023 ADR-0023: Turborepo as monorepo task runner accepted number=23
adr adr:0024 ADR-0024: Monorepo split — `apps/*` (deployables) + `packages/*` (libraries) accepted number=24
adr adr:0025 ADR-0025: OpenAPI 3.1 spec — generated from canonical zod-schemas accepted number=25
adr adr:0026 ADR-0026: n8n — джерело істини для воркфлоу number=26
adr adr:0027 ADR-0027: політика OpenClaw, Console та MCP number=27
adr adr:0028 ADR-0028: pgvector + Voyage embeddings for AI semantic memory Accepted number=28
adr adr:0030 ADR-0030: Структура Telegram-каналів для n8n reporting Accepted number=30
adr adr:0031 ADR-0031: OpenClaw v0 — Telegram-only co-founder bot Superseded by [ADR-0055](./0055-openclaw-external-gateway.md) number=31
adr adr:0032 ADR-0032: Sergeant Console зливається в OpenClaw bot Accepted number=32
adr adr:0033 ADR-0033: OpenClaw multi-personas + `/council` round-table Accepted number=33
adr adr:0034 ADR-0034: Visual regression testing via Argos + Playwright accepted number=34
adr adr:0035 ADR-0035: Distributed tracing — web→server via OpenTelemetry deprecated <!-- reverted 2026-06-26: OpenTelemetry видалено (PR #9); див. banner + Note нижче --> number=35

adr adr:0037 ADR-0037: OpenClaw Phase 4.5 — DB-persistent write-audit log Accepted number=37
adr adr:0038 ADR-0038: Telegram alert acknowledgement + 15-min escalation Active. **Added:** 2026-05-13 (Sprint 6 / alert-escalation-tiers). number=38
adr adr:0039 ADR-0039: Anthropic prompt-cache breakpoint policy Accepted number=39

adr adr:0042 ADR-0042: Password hashing strategy — scrypt (Better Auth default), `MAX_PASSWORD_LENGTH=256` accepted number=42
adr adr:0043 ADR-0043: CloudSync v1 sunset — RFC 8594 deprecation headers + 6-phase rollout Accepted number=43
adr adr:0044 ADR-0044: Renovate as the primary dep-update tool, Dependabot as security-only fallback Accepted number=44

adr adr:0050 ADR-0050: TypeScript major-version policy + `@types/node` pinning Accepted number=50 · last_validated=2026-06-09
adr adr:0051 ADR-0051: Pricing v3 — Free + Pro, single paid tier Superseded by ADR-0068 number=51
adr adr:0052 ADR-0052: Mobile strategy — Capacitor primary, Expo parallel (no deprecation) Accepted number=52
adr adr:0053 ADR-0053: API versioning policy — `/api/*` ↔ `/api/v1/*` mirror Accepted number=53 · last_validated=2026-06-09

Residual is out-of-band: plop stale-branding rename + Sept KV→SQLite tombstone batch + react-hooks burndown (Initiative 0021).

hard-rule hard-rule:1 DB types: coerce `bigint` to `number` in serializers number=1 · severity=blocker · category=blocker-invariant · scope=["apps/server/src/modules/**"]
hard-rule hard-rule:10 Lifecycle markers — every file/doc declares its status number=10 · severity=blocker · category=lint-enforced-convention · scope=["apps/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,mjs,cjs}","packages/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,mjs,cjs}","docs/**/*.md","scripts/**/*.{mjs,js}"]
hard-rule hard-rule:11 No arbitrary hex colors in `className` number=11 · severity=blocker · category=lint-enforced-convention · scope=["apps/web/src/**","apps/mobile/src/**"]
hard-rule hard-rule:12 Module-accent containment — no foreign accents inside a module subtree number=12 · severity=blocker · category=lint-enforced-convention · scope=["apps/web/src/modules/finyk/**","apps/web/src/modules/fizruk/**","apps/web/src/modules/nutrition/**","apps/web/src/modules/routine/**"]
hard-rule hard-rule:13 No raw-palette light/dark `className` pairs number=13 · severity=blocker · category=lint-enforced-convention · scope=["apps/web/src/**","apps/mobile/src/**"]
hard-rule hard-rule:14 Visible focus indicators must use `focus-visible:`, not `focus:` number=14 · severity=blocker · category=lint-enforced-convention · scope=["apps/web/src/**"]
hard-rule hard-rule:15 Read governance before coding; update docs alongside code; internal docs in Ukrainian number=15 · severity=blocker · category=lint-enforced-convention · scope=["**/*"]
hard-rule hard-rule:16 Typography scale — semantic styles + 12px floor number=16 · severity=blocker · category=lint-enforced-convention · scope=["apps/web/src/**","packages/design-tokens/**"]
hard-rule hard-rule:17 Animation budget — max 2 concurrent, 3 tiers number=17 · severity=blocker · category=lint-enforced-convention · scope=["apps/web/src/**","packages/design-tokens/**"]
hard-rule hard-rule:18 Module-size discipline — `max-lines: 600` for web TS/TSX and server TS/JS number=18 · severity=blocker · category=lint-enforced-convention · scope=["apps/web/src/**","apps/server/src/**"]
hard-rule hard-rule:19 Strict-mode flag canonical — `noUncheckedIndexedAccess: true` по всьому monorepo number=19 · severity=blocker · category=lint-enforced-convention · scope=["apps/**/tsconfig.json","packages/**/tsconfig.json"]
hard-rule hard-rule:2 RQ keys: only via centralized factories number=2 · severity=blocker · category=blocker-invariant · scope=["apps/web/src/**","apps/mobile/src/**"]
hard-rule hard-rule:20 No OpenClaw PATs in production number=20 · severity=blocker · category=blocker-invariant · scope=["apps/server/src/env.ts","apps/server/src/env/env.ts","apps/server/src/modules/openclaw/**"]
hard-rule hard-rule:21 Pino redaction policy enforced number=21 · severity=blocker · category=blocker-invariant · scope=["apps/server/src/obs/logger.ts","apps/server/src/**"]
hard-rule hard-rule:22 Skill body security scan — no injection/exfiltration patterns in SKILL.md number=22 · severity=blocker · category=lint-enforced-convention · scope=[".agents/skills/*/SKILL.md"]
hard-rule hard-rule:23 Archive-move depth integrity — no broken `../X` links in docs archives number=23 · severity=blocker · category=lint-enforced-convention · scope=["docs/**/archive/**/*.md"]
hard-rule hard-rule:24 Catalogs registered in `knowledge-graph.json` must have a `--check` generator number=24 · severity=blocker · category=lint-enforced-convention · scope=["docs/04-governance/governance/*.auto.json","docs/04-governance/governance/symbol-index.json","docs/04-governance/governance/knowledge-graph.json","docs/04-governance/governance/retrieval-index.json"]
hard-rule hard-rule:25 Auto-generated docs must start with `<!-- AUTO-GENERATED -->` marker number=25 · severity=blocker · category=lint-enforced-convention · scope=["docs/04-governance/governance/knowledge-graph.html","docs/04-governance/governance/symbol-index.html","docs/02-engineering/architecture/diagrams/c3-workspaces.md","docs/open-work.md","docs/90-work/initiatives/follow-ups.md","docs/00-start/playbooks/INDEX.md"]
hard-rule hard-rule:26 Merged PRs touching canonical docs must update `docs/04-governance/pr-ledger/index.json` number=26 · severity=blocker · category=lint-enforced-convention · scope=["docs/04-governance/adr/*.md","docs/90-work/initiatives/*.md","docs/00-start/playbooks/*.md","docs/04-governance/governance/rules/*.md"]
hard-rule hard-rule:3 API contract: server response shape ↔ `api-client` types ↔ test number=3 · severity=blocker · category=blocker-invariant · scope=["apps/server/src/modules/**","packages/api-client/src/**","apps/server/src/modules/**/*.test.ts"]
hard-rule hard-rule:4 SQL migrations: sequential, no gaps, two-phase for DROP number=4 · severity=blocker · category=blocker-invariant · scope=["apps/server/src/migrations/**"]
hard-rule hard-rule:5 Conventional Commits: explicit scope enum number=5 · severity=blocker · category=lint-enforced-convention · scope=["**/*"]
hard-rule hard-rule:6 No force push to main/master number=6 · severity=blocker · category=blocker-invariant · scope=["main","master"]
hard-rule hard-rule:7 Pre-commit hooks via Husky — do not skip number=7 · severity=blocker · category=blocker-invariant · scope=["**/*"]
hard-rule hard-rule:8 Tailwind colour-opacity steps must be on the registered scale number=8 · severity=blocker · category=lint-enforced-convention · scope=["apps/web/src/**","packages/design-tokens/**"]
hard-rule hard-rule:9 Saturated brand fills behind `text-white` must use the `-strong` companion number=9 · severity=blocker · category=lint-enforced-convention · scope=["apps/web/src/**"]
initiative initiative:0003 0003 — Sync v2 rollout & v1 sunset In progress (Phases 1-6 done; Phase 7 sunset-routes-removal Proposed — exit-criteria 8-week zero signal OR 2026-08-04, whichever first) number=3 · owner=@Skords-01 · priority=P0 (Sprint 1–2)
initiative initiative:0006 0006 — Frontend routing migration + route-based code-split In progress — Phases 1–4 done; Phase 5 **RootLayout + Outlet fix implemented** (2026-06-07): `RootLayout.tsx` + `HubShellContext.tsx` + `ModuleShell.tsx` + 4 per-module `route.tsx` files + `HubPage.tsx` + `router.tsx` rewrite. Location-context bug resolved — each child route renders a DIFFERENT component via `<Outlet />`. **Reconcile 2026-06-15:** insights/settings/onboarding мігровано off the catch-all у власні path-based lazy routes (`/insights/*`, `/settings/*`, `/onboarding/*` + `core/{insights,settings,onboarding}/route.tsx`); route-count тепер 7/8 (лишається свідомо-спільний Hub чанк). Playwright hash-compat e2e додано (`tests/smoke/hash-redirect-smoke.spec.ts`). Pending: native RR7 router-level `loader:` (unblocked, optional), bundle-budget tighten на нові chunk-prefix-и. number=6 · owner=@Skords-01 · priority=P1 (Sprint 2)
initiative initiative:0010 0010 — Revenue-first launch: ship paid, focus wedge In progress number=10 · owner=@Skords-01 · priority=P0 (Sprint 1–4)
initiative initiative:0015 0015 — Docs automation for daily ops In progress — **Phase 1 + Phase 2 code-complete.** Phase 2 (Bundle Beta) shipped: skill+playbook columns + `agent-ready` field on all initiatives + `lint:initiative-agent-ready` gate. Remaining = Phase 1 **observational acceptance only**. **The "7 consecutive cron days" streak BROKE on 2026-06-06.** Verified against GitHub Actions runs of `docs-daily-brief.yml`: green 06-03 / 06-04 / 06-05, then **failed 06-06** (run `27057370680` — the regen-and-push job died on `node adr:0062: duplicate`, i.e. a duplicate-ADR-id check, **not** on the `today.md`/trust-badge generators themselves), then green again 06-07 / 06-08. The original 06-03 → 06-09 window therefore can no longer be all-green; **current consecutive-green run = 2 (06-07 → 06-08)**, 06-09 still pending. The maintainer 5/7-day usage self-report is also still unrecorded. Stays In progress until both signals close; the 7-consecutive-green counter has **reset** and needs a fresh clean 7-day streak. Not 90-day-gated; archival deferred until the observation window closes. number=15
initiative initiative:0017 0017 — Hub Settings & Reports mount perf Closed (2026-06-08 — code-complete; Sprint 0 + Sprint 1 + Sprint 2 merged). Sprint 3 (Web Worker) is a **discrete conditional follow-up** — re-opens ТІЛЬКИ якщо post-merge PostHog `aggregateReport` P95 > 50 ms (next 30-day RUM cut); not tracked as open work here. See § Outcome / § Sprint 3 decision. **Sprint 1 done:** per-section lazy wiring landed on main — the 4 heavy module-scoped sections (`routine`/`fizruk`/`finyk`/`nutrition`) are `lazy()` + `<Suspense fallback={<SectionSkeleton minH={72}/>}>` in `HubSettingsPage.tsx` (`lazy?:{minH}` opt-in field). The 10 lightweight sections stay static **by design** (a per-chunk for a tiny section is net overhead). PR-1.2 cross-module defer landed for **Finyk only** ([#3102](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/3102), `useInView` gate on the Monobank sync-state query + backfill poller) — it was the only section with off-screen _network_ cost; `fizruk`/`nutrition`/`routine` carry only local-state hydration (no `enabled:inView`-gatable queries), already mitigated by the lazy chunk. **Sprint 2 done (2026-05-24):** HubReports per-card lazy decomposition merged via [#3094](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/3094) (squash on main as `5c98b41e`); remote branch `feat/0017-reports-per-card-lazy` auto-deleted. **Remaining:** Sprint 3 conditional on post-merge PostHog `aggregateReport` P95 metrics (cut window — only if > 50 ms); Finalize PR — bundle gate update + tech-debt watchlist drain + Outcome. number=17 · owner=@Skords-01 · priority=P1 (Sprint 1 candidate after [0016](./archive/_0016-changelog-release-cut.md))
initiative initiative:0021 0021 — React-hooks v7 ESLint cleanup In progress number=21
initiative initiative:follow-ups Initiative follow-ups Active
initiative initiative:hardening-matrix Зведена матриця hardening-карток Active
initiative initiative:session-log-0018-agent-find-measurement-2026-06-08 Session log — 0018 `agent:find` lexical measurement (2026-06-08) Reference
initiative initiative:session-log-0018-semantic-measurement-2026-06-14 Session log — 0018 `agent:find` semantic (Voyage) measurement (2026-06-14) Reference
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/00-overview Overview — stack pulse 2026-05 Active
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/01-session-log-2026-05-03 Session log — 2026-05-03 stack-pulse follow-through Reference (frozen historical onboarding log of the 2026-05-03 audit's first PR waves; #1567 merged, carryover items 1/3 resolved — H9/C1/C5/C6 Closed).
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-01-unify-env-modules PR-01: Уніфікувати env-модулі сервера Closed — merged ([#2122](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/2122)). `apps/server/src/env.ts` зведено до 19-рядкового re-export shim над `apps/server/src/env/env.ts` (єдиний Zod-schema джерело правди + `assertStartupEnv()`); CI-guard `scripts/check-env-single-source.mjs` блокує `process.env`-доступ поза дозволеним списком. `env/betterAuthEnv.ts` лишено навмисно — викликається з auth lifecycle до повного startup.
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-02-rate-limit-fail-closed PR-02: Rate-limit fail-closed на `/api/auth/*` Closed — merged [#1552](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/1552)
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-03-bcrypt-password-limit PR-03: password length policy — scrypt premise correction Closed — merged [#1550](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/1550)
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-04-bus-factor-secondary-owners PR-04: Secondary owners + knowledge-transfer plan Closed — last 3 DoD items shipped in this PR: (1) `AGENTS.md` Module ownership map має `Secondary` колонку для всіх 22 рядків (placeholder-роли `TBD (<role>)`), (2) `L2 escalation` поле в `AGENTS.md` тепер посилається на [`docs/00-start/playbooks/operational-continuity.md`](../../../00-start/playbooks/operational-continuity.md) як L2 entry point (vendor support + 1Password vaults замість «paging another person»), (3) `scripts/check-codeowners-coverage.mjs` має `validateAgentsSecondaryColumn()` що падає, якщо хтось додасть рядок без `Secondary`-cell. Раніше landed: CODEOWNERS secondary placeholder block, 6 module walkthroughs у `docs/02-engineering/notes/spikes/2026-05-walkthrough-*.md`, ops-runbook ([#2000](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/2000)). Реальні secondary engineers — окрема hire-driven задача (out of scope).
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-05-typescript-types-node-downgrade PR-05: `@types/node` downgrade до 20.x + ADR на TS 6 vs 5.x Closed — merged (ADR-0050, @types/node pinned to ^20.19.0, pnpm.overrides + renovate rule)
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-06-openclaw-github-app PR-06: OpenClaw → GitHub App, прибрати `Git_PAT` fallback Closed — Phase 1 (GitHub App auth-flow) merged [#1816](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/1816); Phase 2 (default flip + PAT removal + Hard Rule #20) has landed and is tracked by [Hard Rule #20](../../../04-governance/governance/rules/20-no-openclaw-pats-in-production.md).
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-07-body-size-declarative-policy PR-07: Declarative body-size policy Closed — merged [#2081](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/2081)
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-08-api-versioning-consolidation PR-08: API versioning consolidation (видалити v1-rewrite-shim) Closed — research done, decision = keep mirror (див. [ADR-0053](../../../04-governance/adr/0053-api-versioning-policy.md) + [spike](../../../02-engineering/notes/spikes/2026-05-api-v1-usage.md))
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-09-apns-library-adr PR-09: `@parse/node-apn` review (ADR-only) Closed — ADR-0048 merged ([`docs/04-governance/adr/0048-apns-provider-library.md`](../../../04-governance/adr/0048-apns-provider-library.md))
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-10-better-auth-security-review PR-10: Better Auth security review + Safari/Webkit E2E Implemented (PR-48 / pr-plan-2026-05 §Security & supply chain row #48)
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-11-drizzle-schema-drift-ci PR-11: Drizzle schema ↔ SQL drift CI gate Closed — drift CI gate landed (`scripts/check-schema-drift.mjs` + `packages/db-schema/src/__tests__/drift.test.ts`); ROOT-path fix in [#2089](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/2089)
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-12-sentry-traces-sampler PR-12: Sentry tracesSampler dynamic per-route Closed — merged [#2086](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/2086)
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-13-postgres-pool-sizing PR-13: PG pool sizing + monitoring + alerts Closed — implementation merged. Observability стек уже мав
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-14-vercel-coep-review PR-14: Vercel COEP review (require-corp) Closed (2026-05-05, doc-only) — resolved by M21 compatibility matrix
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-15-ai-quota-disabled-hardblock PR-15: `AI_QUOTA_DISABLED=1` hard-block у production Closed — merged [#1567](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/1567) (production-throw у `env.ts` + tests landed in `main`)
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-16-pino-redaction-policy PR-16: Pino redaction policy + ESLint guard Closed — merged [#2125](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/2125). Hard Rule #21 + `sergeant-design/no-raw-req-in-pino-log` ESLint guard + [`docs/04-governance/security/logging-redaction-policy.md`](../../../04-governance/security/logging-redaction-policy.md) зареєстровані.
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-17-env-vars-feature-flag-toggle PR-17: 80+ env-vars → DB feature-flag toggle Planned
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-18-detox-server-shape-trigger PR-18: Detox path-trigger пропускає server-shape changes Closed — Detox iOS + Android `paths` extended to include `apps/server/src/routes/**`, `packages/shared/**`, and `apps/server/src/migrations/**` (the actual server layout — there is no `apps/server/src/modules/**/*.routes.ts` tree as the original card assumed). CONTRIBUTING.md updated. A separate `scripts/check-api-client-coverage.mjs` gate was intentionally not added: `api:check-openapi` + `api:check-openapi-types` already cover the generated OpenAPI/api-client freshness path.
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-19-workers-health-registry PR-19: Workers health-registry + `/api/health/workers` endpoint Active — `/health/workers` endpoint shipped via PR [#1995](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/1995) (commit [`cdcdb5ba`](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/commit/cdcdb5ba)) з in-memory per-queue stats (`aiMemoryIngest` + `monoEnrichment` + `backgroundQueue`); запропонована `worker_health` DB-table + Grafana dashboards / `worker_lag_seconds` метрика — deferred (current in-memory підхід satisfies M3 monitoring need without DB writes), reactivation trigger — наступний stalled-worker incident.
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-20-patches-readme PR-20: `patches/` debt без README Closed — `patches/README.md` schema + `scripts/check-patches-doc.mjs` + `pnpm lint:patches` CI gate landed in [#2193](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/2193) (`fix(docs): restore patches/README Status badge + prettier --write 33 stale docs`). All 4 DoD items shipped: README table з 1 row на `@expo__cli@0.22.28.patch`, `scripts/check-patches-doc.mjs` (10 KB), 6-fixture node:test у `scripts/__tests__/check-patches-doc.test.mjs`, та `lint:patches` step у `.github/workflows/ci.yml` (line 130) — закриває M4 у `00-overview.md`.
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-21-sw-prompt-mode-auto-update PR-21: SW `prompt`-mode auto-update on inactivity Closed — SW prompt-mode auto-update shipped in [#2309](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/2309); `setupAutoUpdate()` lives at `apps/web/src/core/app/autoUpdate.ts` + `apps/server/src/http/buildIdHeader.ts` issues `X-Server-Build-Id` on every response.
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-22-mobile-expo-sdk-53 PR-22: Mobile Expo SDK 52 → 53 upgrade Planned
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-23-openapi-contract-tests PR-23: OpenAPI spec contract-tested vs runtime Active — Phase 1 (generation + freshness gate) shipped + [ADR-0062](../../../04-governance/adr/0062-openapi-source-of-truth.md) source-of-truth написаний (2026-06-05); contract roundtrip tests (`tests/contract/`) + Schemathesis property-based testing лишаються deferred. Phase 1 закриває drift-detection use-case (spec ↔ runtime Zod); roundtrip/property-based testing активуються коли з'явиться перший contract-bug у production.
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-24-embedding-vendor-abstraction PR-24: Embedding-vendor abstraction (voyage-3.5-lite lock-in) Active — groundwork done; abstraction вже в коді (2026-05-13 план передував поточній архітектурі). `EmbeddingProvider`/`VectorStore` vendor-agnostic інтерфейси (`types.ts`) + `createVoyageEmbeddingProvider` factory + per-row `embedding_provider`/`embedding_model`/`embedding_version` колонки вже існували; цей прохід додав active-model read-filter у `vectorStore.query` + `docs/00-start/playbooks/embedding-provider-migration.md`. **Лишилось — лише живий vendor-switch (rollout PR-3), genuinely trigger-gated** на voyage regression / pricing / outage. `047_model_id` міграція та env-router/OpenAI-adapter — superseded (redundant / speculative dead code до реального тригера).
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-25-two-production-origins PR-25: Consolidate `fizruk.vercel.app` + `sergeant.vercel.app` → один production origin Active — PR-1 shipped (#3392: 301 fizruk→sergeant redirect + Sentry release unification); PR-2 (drop fizruk from apps/server/src/http/cors.ts + Google/Apple OAuth consoles) pending 30-day soak + manual OAuth-console step; ADR-0009 single-origin section TODO.
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-26-csp-report-uri PR-26: CSP `report-uri` / `report-to` endpoint Closed (modulo E2E) — modern Reporting API (`Reporting-Endpoints` header + `report-to csp-endpoint` directive) shipped in `apps/web/vercel.json`; `docs/03-operations/observability/csp-monitoring.md` operations playbook live. Rate-limit (120/min IP) + 16 KB body cap було мерджнуто раніше через `apps/server/src/http/bodySizePolicy.ts` + `apps/server/src/routes/csp-report.ts`. E2E `/dummy-violation-page.html` тест — лишається у backlog (browser-level CSP-violation hard to reproduce у unit-test, потребує Playwright fixture; не блокує закриття).
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-27-internal-api-key-rotation PR-27: `INTERNAL_API_KEY` rotation мechanism Planned
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-28-sw-build-id-import-meta PR-28: `__SW_BUILD_ID__` global → `import.meta.env.VITE_BUILD_ID` Closed — merged [#2309](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/2309) (commit `e8ada9f2`). Migration covers всі два ambient global-и (`__SW_BUILD_ID__` у SW + `__APP_BUILD_ID__` у React Query persister), які ділили той самий build-id; після цього PR-у вони живуть як single `import.meta.env.VITE_BUILD_ID` з типами у `apps/web/src/vite-env.d.ts`.
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-29-shell-navigate-broadcast-channel PR-29: `window.__sergeantShellNavigate` global → BroadcastChannel Active (PR-1 shipped — BroadcastChannel sender + listener в `apps/mobile-shell/src/index.ts` і `apps/web/src/core/app/ShellDeepLinkBridge.tsx`; `window.__sergeantShellNavigate` лишається як backward-compat alias до PR-2 у serpni 2026)
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-30-dockerfile-cleanup-cve PR-30: Dockerfile post-install cleanup CVE-shrink fragility Done — multi-stage distroless shipped via PR [#2543](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/2543) (commit [`51b6fee0`](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/commit/51b6fee0), 2026-05-13). OpenClaw-side Trivy follow-up landed in commit [`120ec9d94`](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/commit/120ec9d944eebf8bbc15c5360c4f1e8dbd15ae1d) on 2026-06-09.
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-31-eslint-config-split PR-31: ESLint config 1073 рядки → split per-app Phase 1 + Phase 2 scaffolding + Phase 2a + **Phase 2b shipped (2026-06-15).** Phase 1: baseline extracted into `eslint.baseline.js` (~180 рядків, byte-identical `--print-config`). Phase 2 scaffolding (2026-06-01): `scripts/eslint-print-config-diff.mjs` + surface snapshots під `scripts/__fixtures__/eslint-print-config/` + `pnpm lint:eslint-config-diff` gate. Phase 2a (2026-06-05): per-surface extraction — блоки у `eslint.web.js` / `eslint.server.js` / `eslint.mobile.js` / `eslint.shell.js` / `eslint.packages.js` / `eslint.cross-surface.js`; root manifest 1128 → 37 рядків. **Phase 2b (2026-06-15):** справжні standalone per-package `eslint.config.js` у 12 linted-пакетах (`apps/{web,server,mobile,mobile-shell}`, `packages/{shared,api-client,db-schema,finyk-domain,fizruk-domain,nutrition-domain,routine-domain,eslint-plugin-sergeant-design}`) — кожен re-export-ить root-manifest через `basePath`-wrapper (`eslint.per-package.js`), тож `turbo run lint` резолвить per-package config замість walk-up до root → unlocks per-package Turbo parallelism. Diff-gate переведено у cd-per-package режим; `normaliseConfig` пофікшено, щоб не корумпувати backslash у regex-селекторах на Windows. **Byte-neutral**: `lint:eslint-config-diff` — усі 7 fixtures match (5 снапшотів незмінні, 2 оновлені лише на pre-existing stale drift: server `max-lines` allowlist + 2 web i18n-allowlist записи). `turbo run lint` зелений: 15/15 tasks, 0 errors.
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-32-pnpm-overrides-cleanup PR-32: `pnpm.overrides` quarterly cleanup Closed (PR [#2423](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/2423))
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-33-hard-rules-categorization PR-33: 21 hard rules — categorize Closed — implemented via 3 enforcement-categories (`blocker-invariant` / `lint-enforced-convention` / `active-initiative`) instead of 5 subject-categories. See [ADR-0045](../../../04-governance/adr/0045-hard-rules-taxonomy.md), [`docs/04-governance/governance/hard-rules-matrix.md`](../../../04-governance/governance/hard-rules-matrix.md), [`docs/04-governance/governance/rules/`](../../../04-governance/governance/rules) per-rule files, AGENTS.md `Hard rules` section, and `pnpm lint:hard-rules-registry` 3-way sync gate.
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-34-demo-seed-cleanup-gate PR-34: `runDemoSeedFromUrl` / `runDemoCleanupOnce` on every load Closed (PR [#2423](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/2423), commit [`264288ec`](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/commit/264288ec))
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-35-log-level-debug-window PR-35: `LOG_LEVEL=info` default + 5-min debug-window toggle Closed (2026-06-15) — server-side shipped (PR #2423: logger.ts debug-window + route #3096). The deferred tools/openclaw CLI follow-up is permanently moot (the grammy bot was deleted in PR #3470). Canonical home: apps/server/src/obs/logger.ts (Hard Rule #21) + docs/03-operations/observability/log-levels.md.
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-36-lazy-import-chunk-reload-guard PR-36: `lazyImport` chunk-reload no-infinite-loop guard Closed — merged [#2311](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/2311) (commit `9bfa006d`). Код живе не у `lazyImport.ts` (як писалось у плані на 2026-05-07), а у `apps/web/src/core/lib/chunkReload.ts` — reload-recovery вже був рефакторений у окремий модуль з cooldown-гардом. Цей PR додав counter-window guard (`MAX_RELOADS = 3`, sliding `RESET_AFTER_MS = 5min`) поверх існуючого 10s cooldown-у.
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-37-postgres-image-sha-pin PR-37: Postgres image SHA-pinning Closed — merged [#2308](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/2308) (commit `348f5773`). CI workflows (`ci.yml:410`, `extended-e2e.yml:57`, `visual-regression.yml:40`, `db-backup-verify.yml:34`) already pin `pgvector/pgvector:pg16@sha256:7d400e34…` (landed earlier under M21 / supply-chain hardening). Цей PR закрив останнє drift-місце — `docker-compose.yml` (local dev) — і додав Renovate `pinDigests` rule + setup runbook.
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-38-pwa-precache-first-party PR-38: PWA precache 1st-party verify Closed — merged [#2312](https://github.com/Skords-01/Sergeant/pull/2312) (commit `e227f2b6`). Скрипт живе не у `apps/web/scripts/` (як писалось у плані на 2026-05-07), а у кореневій `scripts/` — всі інші freshness/процес-гейти репо живуть там (`check-patches-doc.mjs`, `check-tech-debt-freshness.mjs`, ін.). Скрипт використовує `apps/server/dist/sw.js` (`apps/web` білдить сюди через `outDir`).
initiative initiative:stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-39-tools-console-anthropic-sdk PR-39: `tools/openclaw` Anthropic SDK 0.36.3 → latest Closed (2026-06-15) — SDK history captured in ADR-0057 (Accepted). The tracked surface (tools/openclaw + run-agent-loop.ts + its @anthropic-ai/sdk consumer) was deleted in PR #3470, so the v1-GA follow-up is moot. Canonical home: ADR-0057.
playbook playbook:access-governance Управління привілейованим доступом (access governance) Active
playbook playbook:add-api-endpoint Add API Endpoint Active
playbook playbook:add-feature-flag Додати feature flag Active
playbook playbook:add-hard-rule Додати Hard Rule Active
playbook playbook:add-hubchat-tool Додати HubChat Tool Active
playbook playbook:add-monobank-event-handler Add Monobank Event Handler Active
playbook playbook:add-new-page-route Add New Page Route Active
playbook playbook:add-onboarding-step Add Onboarding Step Active
playbook playbook:add-push-notification Add Push Notification Active
playbook playbook:add-react-query-hook Add React Query Hook Active
playbook playbook:add-sql-migration Add SQL Migration Active
playbook playbook:author-skill Author or Edit a SKILL.md Active
playbook playbook:bump-dep-safely Bump Dependency Safely Active
playbook playbook:change-auth-flow Change an Auth Flow (Better Auth) Active
playbook playbook:cleanup-codex-branch-after-pr Cleanup Codex branch after PR Active
playbook playbook:cleanup-dead-code Прибирання dead code Active
playbook playbook:cutover-openclaw-gateway Cutover OpenClaw на зовнішній Gateway (Stage 7) Active
playbook playbook:debug-chat-tool Debug HubChat Tool Active
playbook playbook:declare-incident Оголошення інциденту Active
playbook playbook:deploy-config-change Зміна deploy-конфігу (vercel / fly / railway / Dockerfile) Active
playbook playbook:embedding-provider-migration Embedding Provider Migration Active
playbook playbook:enable-prompt-caching Enable Anthropic Prompt Caching Active
playbook playbook:execute-planning-batch Виконання батчу planning-тасків (parallel fan-out) Active
playbook playbook:fix-exhaustive-deps Fix Exhaustive Deps Warnings Active
playbook playbook:fix-failing-ci Fix Failing CI on a PR Active
playbook playbook:hotfix-prod-regression Hotfix Production Regression Active
playbook playbook:investigate-alert Розслідування alert-у Active
playbook playbook:migrate-localstorage-to-typedstore Migrate localStorage to typedStore Active
playbook playbook:modify-console-agent Зміна або додавання console-агента Active
playbook playbook:modify-n8n-workflow Зміна або додавання n8n-воркфлоу Active
playbook playbook:onboard-external-api Onboard External API Active
playbook playbook:operational-continuity Operational continuity Active
playbook playbook:playbook-catalog Playbook Catalog Active
playbook playbook:port-web-screen-to-mobile Порт web-екрану в mobile Active
playbook playbook:pre-merge-migration-checklist Pre-Merge Migration Checklist Active
playbook playbook:prettier-pass-on-docs Prettier Pass on `docs/` Active
playbook playbook:reconcile-doc-drift Звірка дрифту документації та архівація Active
playbook playbook:release Реліз Active
playbook playbook:restore-from-backup Restore from Backup Active
playbook playbook:retire-feature-flag Retire Feature Flag Active
playbook playbook:rotate-openclaw-credentials Ротація OpenClaw GitHub credentials Active
playbook playbook:rotate-secrets Rotate Secrets Active
playbook playbook:run-council Council — рада директорів для product рішень Active
playbook playbook:run-squad-deliver Squad deliver — sequential cross-surface feature delivery Active
playbook playbook:run-squad-qa Squad QA — паралельний QA по всіх surfaces Active
playbook playbook:run-squad-review Squad review — паралельний PR review через 4 lens-агентів Active
playbook playbook:run-weekly-operator-digest Тижневий operator-дайджест Active
playbook playbook:security-pen-test-checklist Security pen-test checklist for closed hardening cards Active
playbook playbook:stabilize-flaky-test Stabilize Flaky Test Active
playbook playbook:sync-rn-migration-progress Sync RN Migration Progress Active
playbook playbook:test-backup-restore Тестове відновлення бекапу Active
playbook playbook:tune-system-prompt Tune System Prompt Active
playbook playbook:write-e2e-test Write or Debug a Playwright E2E Test Active
playbook playbook:write-postmortem Postmortem після інциденту Active
skill skill:better-auth-best-practices better-auth-best-practices description=Use when editing Sergeant auth — login, signup, session cookies, middleware, account lifecycle, Better Auth wiring; also when touching protected routes or token refresh; UA: правиш логін, реєстрацію, сесії, авторизацію.
skill skill:sergeant-backend-architecture sergeant-backend-architecture description=Backend architecture patterns — Clean Architecture, Hexagonal, CQRS, Event Sourcing, Temporal, Saga, microservices. UA: архітектура бекенду, мікросервіси, event sourcing.
skill skill:sergeant-bugfix-and-regression sergeant-bugfix-and-regression description=Use when fixing a Sergeant bug, regression, flaky test, broken deploy, or production issue — even if the fix seems obvious, always reproduce first; UA: фіксиш баг, регресію, флакі-тест, зламаний деплой.
skill skill:sergeant-council sergeant-council description=Use when the founder needs a multi-perspective advisory board — spawns council specialists in parallel (product, ux, growth, tech, critic) and synthesizes recommendations; UA: скликай раду / порадься з командою.
skill skill:sergeant-data-and-migrations sergeant-data-and-migrations description=Use when changing Sergeant SQL, Postgres schema, query behavior, migration numbering, or Railway pre-deploy data paths; also when adding indexes or fixing query perf; UA: правиш SQL, схему БД, міграції, rollout даних.
skill skill:sergeant-deliver-squad sergeant-deliver-squad description=Use when implementing a Sergeant feature across 2+ surfaces with contract dependencies (DB + server + api-client + web/mobile) — sequential subagent handoffs prevent bigint and triplet gaps; UA: фіча через 2+ surfaces.
skill skill:sergeant-deploy-and-observability sergeant-deploy-and-observability description=Use when a Sergeant change touches deploy config, env vars, Railway/Vercel, health checks, Sentry, n8n, or production verification; also when editing CI/CD or Dockerfile; UA: деплой, env, Railway, Vercel, Sentry, n8n.
skill skill:sergeant-e2e-testing sergeant-e2e-testing description=Use when writing, reviewing, or debugging Playwright E2E tests in apps/web; for auth fixtures, network mocking, trace debugging, or CI retry config; UA: Playwright, E2E тести, e2e, smoke test.
skill skill:sergeant-feature-delivery sergeant-feature-delivery description=Use when building a new Sergeant feature, screen, endpoint, workflow, or behavior change needing design, planning, tests, docs, and verification — even if scope looks small; UA: робиш нову фічу/екран/endpoint.
skill skill:sergeant-hubchat sergeant-hubchat description=Use when creating, modifying, reviewing, or debugging Sergeant HubChat tool defs, executors, action cards, or chat side effects; also when editing AI prompts or stream; UA: правиш HubChat tool/executor/action card/chat.
skill skill:sergeant-mobile-expo sergeant-mobile-expo description=Use when editing Sergeant Expo screens, React Native, mobile navigation, MMKV flows, Capacitor shell, or web→mobile ports; also for platform-specific bugs; UA: правиш Expo/RN/MMKV/Capacitor/mobile-shell.
skill skill:sergeant-monorepo-boundaries sergeant-monorepo-boundaries description=Use when a Sergeant change spans multiple apps/packages, extracts shared logic, or import boundaries are unclear — even if the change seems isolated to one app; UA: межі між app/package, спільна логіка в монорепо.
skill skill:sergeant-openclaw sergeant-openclaw description=Use when working on the OpenClaw Gateway service, console agent, @sergeant/openclaw-plugin package, ops/openclaw config, or Telegram bot identity; UA: OpenClaw / gateway / console-agent / openclaw-plugin / Telegram-бот.
skill skill:sergeant-planning-batch sergeant-planning-batch description=Use when executing a batch of N open tasks from docs/90-work/planning/* PR-plans — dynamic selection, parallel agent fan-out, tracker updates, fast-forward archival of complete docs; UA: виконати батч planning-тасків.
skill skill:sergeant-qa-squad sergeant-qa-squad description=Use when running full QA across all Sergeant surfaces — spawns qa-server, qa-web, qa-mobile, qa-openclaw as Agent Team in parallel and synthesizes per-surface results; UA: повний QA по всіх surfaces.
skill skill:sergeant-review-and-merge sergeant-review-and-merge description=Use when reviewing a Sergeant PR, preparing for merge, checking commit scope, validating docs freshness, or deciding if a change is safe to ship; also for rollback safety checks; UA: ревʼю PR і мердж.
skill skill:sergeant-review-squad sergeant-review-squad description=Use for Sergeant PR review touching 3+ governed surfaces — spawns 4 Agent Team reviewers (contract, design, security, docs) in parallel then synthesizes; UA: ревʼю PR через 3+ governed surfaces паралельно.
skill skill:sergeant-security-audit sergeant-security-audit description=Use when running a security review of Sergeant code or API, auditing deps with pnpm audit, or checking PAT/credential safety; before any auth or user-data surface ships; UA: security review, перевірка безпеки, аудит.
skill skill:sergeant-server-api sergeant-server-api description=Use when editing Sergeant server routes, serializers, modules, api-client types, React Query server hooks, or time-sensitive logic; also for middleware or env changes; UA: правиш роути/серіалізатори/RQ-хуки.
skill skill:sergeant-start-here sergeant-start-here description=Use when starting any task in the Sergeant repo — web, server, mobile, migrations, HubChat, deploys, reviews, or cross-package boundaries; always load this skill first; UA: будь-яка нова задача в Sergeant.
skill skill:sergeant-tech-debt sergeant-tech-debt description=Use when reducing technical debt, cleaning dead code with Knip, lowering ESLint baseline violations, or tackling Hard Rule #18 (module-size) refactor sprints in Sergeant; UA: технічний борг, dead code, рефакторинг.
skill skill:sergeant-web-ui sergeant-web-ui description=Use when editing Sergeant web UI, PWA shell, React screens, Tailwind, accessibility, localStorage flows, or shared web interaction patterns; also for design tokens or theme; UA: правиш веб-UI/PWA/Tailwind.
skill skill:sergeant-writing-skills sergeant-writing-skills description=Use when creating, editing, or pressure-testing a `.agents/skills/*/SKILL.md` in Sergeant — applies TDD to skill content; UA: пишеш або редагуєш SKILL.md.

graph LR
  adr_0001["ADR-0001: Monetization architecture (16 рішень перед стартом"]
  adr_0002["ADR-0002: AI tool lifecycle (proposal → safety review → roll"]
  adr_0003["ADR-0003: Refund and dispute handling"]
  adr_0004["ADR-0004: CloudSync — LWW conflict resolution"]
  adr_0005["ADR-0005: Anthropic model selection + prompt caching"]
  adr_0006["ADR-0006: React Query keys via centralized factory (no inlin"]
  adr_0007["ADR-0007: Tailwind colour-opacity scale + WCAG-AA `-strong` "]
  adr_0008["ADR-0008: Feature flags — client-only registry over typedSto"]
  adr_0009["ADR-0009: Hosting split — Railway (API + Postgres) + Vercel "]
  adr_0010["ADR-0010: Mobile dual-track — Capacitor shell + Expo native"]
  adr_0011["ADR-0011: Local-first storage — клієнт як джерело істини, се"]
  adr_0012["ADR-0012: RLS як authz boundary — цільова модель, наразі app"]
  adr_0013["ADR-0013: DB migrations conventions — sequential, forward-on"]
  adr_0014["ADR-0014: `bigint` → `number` coercion у API-серіалізаторах"]
  adr_0015["ADR-0015: Observability stack — Pino + Prometheus + Sentry"]
  adr_0016["ADR-0016: User deletion and PII handling"]
  adr_0017["ADR-0017: Better Auth choice and session model"]
  adr_0018["ADR-0018: API versioning policy (`/api/v1`)"]
  adr_0019["ADR-0019: Push notifications — server-driven fan-out (web + "]
  adr_0020["ADR-0020: Testing pyramid — unit / integration / a11y / smok"]
  adr_0021["ADR-0021: Memory Bank — local-first AI user-fact store"]
  adr_0022["ADR-0022: Atomic SQL daily quotas — `INSERT ... ON CONFLICT "]
  adr_0023["ADR-0023: Turborepo as monorepo task runner"]
  adr_0024["ADR-0024: Monorepo split — `apps/*` (deployables) + `package"]
  adr_0025["ADR-0025: OpenAPI 3.1 spec — generated from canonical zod-sc"]
  adr_0026["ADR-0026: n8n — джерело істини для воркфлоу"]
  adr_0027["ADR-0027: політика OpenClaw, Console та MCP"]
  adr_0028["ADR-0028: pgvector + Voyage embeddings for AI semantic memor"]
  adr_0030["ADR-0030: Структура Telegram-каналів для n8n reporting"]
  adr_0031["ADR-0031: OpenClaw v0 — Telegram-only co-founder bot"]
